appliedUpdates.description: Documented mission-required compose port overrides, DD_API_KEY local fallback, and readiness-vs-aggregate-health guidance for targeted runtime validation.

environmentConstraints: The delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` helper failed twice without returning output, so this round used the documented direct in-session validation fallback.
The checked-out `.env` overrides compose ports away from the approved mission boundary unless explicit APP_PORT/MANAGEMENT_PORT/MAILHOG/RabbitMQ overrides are provided.

The compose-backed runtime returned aggregate actuator health 503 while readiness stayed 200 and the target auth/control-plane APIs remained functional; validation readiness was therefore judged from readiness plus endpoint probes.
